title: Explore Our Apartments
subtitle: Luxury, Comfort and Serenity in Tangier
form_semi_title: Book Your Stay at La Teral
cta_show_room: Contact us for our special offers

rooms.title: SIGNATURE LUXURY SUITE
rooms.description: Experience the exceptional in Tangier in our 150 sqm Signature Suite at La Teral. This prestige apartment combines elegance and natural light to offer a refined atmosphere with breathtaking views of the sea and mountains. Perfect for families, it features three spacious, soundproofed bedrooms, one of which offers an elegant and friendly corner for your relaxation moments or breakfasts.
features: 3 spacious and soundproofed bedrooms (one with a lounge area).
High-quality hypoallergenic bedding and Smart TV in each bedroom.
2 modern living rooms with extra comfortable sofas and Smart TV.
1 ultra-equipped modern kitchen (coffee machine, washing machine, oven, etc.).
2 private balconies with breathtaking views of the sea and mountains.

rooms.title: A HAVEN OF PEACE & COMFORT
rooms.description: Treat yourself to a peaceful stay in this modern 65 sqm apartment, designed for your well-being. Enjoy two cozy bedrooms with hypoallergenic bedding, a bright living room with a Smart TV, and a fully equipped kitchen opening onto a sunny terrace. Every detail has been thought out to offer you total serenity.
features: 2 comfortable bedrooms (1 double bed and 2 single beds) with hypoallergenic bedding.
Smart TV in each bedroom and safe.
Bright living room with comfortable sofa and Smart TV.
1 fully equipped kitchen (hobs, microwave oven, refrigerator, washing machine, coffee machine).

rooms.title: THE PERFECT BALANCE
rooms.description: Stay in a modern and refined setting in the heart of Tangier. This spacious 73 sqm apartment welcomes you with two elegant bedrooms with hypoallergenic bedding, a bright living room with extra comfortable sofas and a Smart TV. Its modern kitchen opens onto a pleasant sunny terrace, while its private balcony offers a breathtaking view of the mountains.
features: 2 elegant bedrooms (1 double bed and 2 single beds) with hypoallergenic bedding.
Smart TV in each bedroom and safe.
Bright living room with extra comfortable sofas and Smart TV.
1 modern, fully equipped kitchen (appliances and utensils).
1 private balcony with breathtaking mountain views.

rooms.title: THE ALLIANCE OF COMFORT
rooms.description: Welcome to a modern and warm setting, designed for your absolute well-being. This spacious 73 sqm apartment welcomes you with two cozy bedrooms, with hypoallergenic bedding and soundproofed windows to guarantee you totally calm nights. Relax in a light-filled living room or enjoy your equipped kitchen opening onto a private balcony with a breathtaking view.
features: 2 cozy bedrooms (1 double bed and 2 single beds) with hypoallergenic bedding.
Smart TV in each bedroom and safe.
Bright living room with comfortable sofa and Smart TV.
1 equipped kitchen opening onto a private balcony.

rooms.title: COZY & BRIGHT
rooms.description: Stay in a modern and soothing setting, ideally located in the heart of Tangier. Apartment No. 5 welcomes you with two comfortable bedrooms designed for your rest, as well as a bright living room with plush sofas and a Smart TV for your relaxation moments. Its fully equipped kitchen and contemporary bathroom offer all the comfort you need for a "home away from home" stay.
features: 2 comfortable bedrooms (1 double bed and 2 single beds) with hypoallergenic bedding.
Smart TV in each bedroom and safe.
Bright living room with plush sofas and Smart TV.
1 fully equipped kitchen (hobs, microwave oven, refrigerator, washing machine, coffee machine).

included_features: All our apartments include: Central air conditioning, free high-speed Wi-Fi, free secure parking, free housekeeping service, 24/7 security service (guard, outdoor cameras, fire extinguishers), private washing machine, Smart TV in each bedroom, high-quality hypoallergenic bedding, soundproofed windows, elevator access to all floors, and continuous hot and cold water.
